// Tasks: Wrappers around the xcodebuild / xcrun simctl / swift test commands we've been running by hand. Cmd-Shift-B picks the default ('Build app target'). All other tasks are reachable via Cmd-Shift-P → 'Tasks: Run Task'.

tasks.label: Build app target
tasks.command: xcodebuild build -project steward-ios.xcodeproj -scheme steward-ios -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro' -derivedDataPath ./build

tasks.label: Test (iOS target via xcodebuild)
tasks.command: xcodebuild test -project steward-ios.xcodeproj -scheme steward-ios -destination 'platform=iOS Simulator,name=iPhone 17 Pro'

tasks.label: Install + launch (clean signin)
tasks.command: xcrun simctl uninstall booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios; xcrun simctl install booted ./build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/steward-ios.app && SIMCTL_CHILD_USE_EMULATOR=1 SIMCTL_CHILD_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1 xcrun simctl launch booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios

tasks.label: Install + launch (auto-signin as bishop)
tasks.command: xcrun simctl terminate booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios; xcrun simctl install booted ./build/Build/Products/Debug-iphonesimulator/steward-ios.app && SIMCTL_CHILD_USE_EMULATOR=1 SIMCTL_CHILD_EMULATOR_HOST=127.0.0.1 SIMCTL_CHILD_AUTO_SIGNIN_BISHOP=1 xcrun simctl launch booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios

tasks.label: Screenshot — light
tasks.command: xcrun simctl ui booted appearance light && sleep 1 && xcrun simctl io booted screenshot /tmp/steward-light.png && open /tmp/steward-light.png

tasks.label: Screenshot — dark
tasks.command: xcrun simctl ui booted appearance dark && sleep 1 && xcrun simctl io booted screenshot /tmp/steward-dark.png && open /tmp/steward-dark.png

tasks.label: Wipe app (sign out)
tasks.command: xcrun simctl terminate booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios; xcrun simctl uninstall booted ca.thevincistudios.steward-ios
